# Diamond ring and Baily's beads (C2) - REMOVE SOLAR FILTER!
take_burst, C2, -, 0:00:05.0, Canon EOS R5, 1/160, 5.6, 400, 3, "Pre-C2 beads"
take_burst, C2, -, 0:00:02.0, Canon EOS R5, 2.5, 5.6, 400, 3, "C2 diamond ring"

# Totality - Solar Corona
# Corona shots every 2 step(s)
# Prominences and inner corona
take_picture, C2, +, 0:00:03.0, Canon EOS R5, 1/40, 5.6, 400, "Prominences"
take_picture, C2, +, 0:00:05.0, Canon EOS R5, 1/8, 5.6, 400, "Corona inner"

# Mid-totality corona sequence
take_bracket, MAX, -, 0:00:10.0, Canon EOS R5, 1.3, 5.6, 400, "+/- 2", "Corona bracket mid"
take_bracket, MAX, +, 0:00:00.0, Canon EOS R5, 1.3, 5.6, 400, "+/- 2", "Corona maximum"
take_picture, MAX, +, 0:00:05.0, Canon EOS R5, 2.5, 5.6, 400, "Corona outer"

# Chromosphere
take_picture, C3, -, 0:00:02.0, Canon EOS R5, 1/60, 5.6, 400, "Chromosphere pre-C3"

# Diamond ring and Baily's beads (C3)
take_burst, C3, +, 0:00:02.0, Canon EOS R5, 2.5, 5.6, 400, 3, "C3 diamond ring"
take_burst, C3, +, 0:00:05.0, Canon EOS R5, 1/160, 5.6, 400, 3, "Post-C3 beads"
# REPLACE SOLAR FILTER after C3!

# Fourth contact (C4) - with solar filter
take_picture, C4, -, 0:00:02.0, Canon EOS R5, 4, 5.6, 400, "Fourth contact (C4-2s)"
take_picture, C4, +, 0:00:00.0, Canon EOS R5, 4, 5.6, 400, "Fourth contact (C4)"
take_picture, C4, +, 0:00:02.0, Canon EOS R5, 4, 5.6, 400, "Fourth contact (C4+2s)"

# Camera synchronization
sync_cameras, C2, -, 0:05:00.0, "Initial camera sync before C2"

# End of script
